content:
on a vaguely related side note as it pertains to damage calcs:

poison infliction increase appears to be separated into two pools which are additive within the pool, but multiplicative with each other

pool A:
```
Wheels
Covenants
Nymphaea soulforge (presumably most other character soulforges as well, though have not tested other specific ones
```
pool B:
```
Astral Reign ruleset modifier (10%)
GDoll soulforge (unsure if this is specifically only GDoll or if it randomly varies between awakeners)
Nymphaea Rouse
Nymphaea OE
```
so putting the 2 together is more or less effective?
well the pools are set so it's not something the player can control, but being two pools that are multiplicative with each other means greater returns than if everything was just additive, yeah
